en.subject: Your events attracted {total_users} swimmers on open-water-swims.com!
en.body:
Dear {organizer_name},

Open Water Swims is a not-for-profit platform that helps swimmers discover open water swimming events worldwide.

Your events on our platform attracted {total_users} interested swimmers in 2025!

The "Interested Swimmers" column shows how many users viewed each event page (data from Google Analytics):

{event_table} {next_year_events}

Planning more events for 2026? Submit them to reach even more swimmers:

Submit Your Event

Best regards,
Silvan Mühlemann
Open Water Swims

This email was generated automatically, but I will personally respond to any replies.

de.subject: Ihre Veranstaltungen haben {total_users} Schwimmer auf open-water-swims.com angezogen!
de.body:
Lieber {organizer_name},

Open Water Swims ist eine gemeinnützige Plattform, die Schwimmern hilft, weltweit Freiwasser-Schwimmveranstaltungen zu entdecken.

Ihre Veranstaltungen auf unserer Plattform haben im Jahr 2025 {total_users} interessierte Schwimmer angezogen!

Die Spalte "Interessierte Schwimmer" zeigt, wie viele Nutzer die jeweilige Veranstaltungsseite angesehen haben (Daten aus Google Analytics):

{event_table} {next_year_events}

Planen Sie weitere Veranstaltungen für 2026? Reichen Sie sie ein, um noch mehr Schwimmer zu erreichen:

Veranstaltung einreichen

Mit freundlichen Grüßen,
Silvan Mühlemann
Open Water Swims

Diese E-Mail wurde automatisch erstellt, aber ich werde persönlich auf Antworten reagieren.

en.subject: Reach 11,000 swimmers with your 2026 events
en.body:
Dear {organizer_name},

Open Water Swims is a not-for-profit platform that helps swimmers discover open water swimming events worldwide.

In 2025, 11,000 swimmers used our platform to discover events from our database of {total_event_count} events - including yours:

{event_table} {next_year_events}

Planning more events for 2026? Submit them to reach even more swimmers:

Submit Your Event

Best regards,
Silvan Mühlemann
Open Water Swims

This email was generated automatically, but I will personally respond to any replies.

nl.subject: Bereik 11.000 zwemmers met uw evenementen in 2026
nl.body:
Beste {organizer_name},

Open Water Swims is een non-profit platform dat zwemmers helpt open water zwemevenementen wereldwijd te ontdekken.

In 2025 hebben 11.000 zwemmers ons platform gebruikt om evenementen uit onze database van {total_event_count} evenementen te ontdekken – waaronder die van u:

{event_table} {next_year_events}

Plant u meer evenementen voor 2026? Dien ze in om nog meer zwemmers te bereiken:

Dien uw evenement in

Met vriendelijke groet,
Silvan Mühlemann
Open Water Swims

Deze e-mail is automatisch gegenereerd, maar ik zal persoonlijk reageren op antwoorden.

ca.subject: Arriba a 11.000 nedadors amb els teus esdeveniments del 2026
ca.body:
Benvolgut/da {organizer_name},

Open Water Swims és una plataforma sense ànim de lucre que ajuda els nedadors a descobrir esdeveniments de natació en aigües obertes arreu del món.

El 2025, 11.000 nedadors van utilitzar la nostra plataforma per descobrir esdeveniments de la nostra base de dades de {total_event_count} esdeveniments, inclosos els teus:

{event_table} {next_year_events}

Estàs planejant més esdeveniments per al 2026? Envia'ls per arribar a encara més nedadors:

Envia el teu esdeveniment

Cordialment,
Silvan Mühlemann
Open Water Swims

Aquest correu electrònic s'ha generat automàticament, però respondré personalment a les respostes.
